pr_text:
## Title: Fix type confusion in RB_FOREACH calls in NR RRC CU-UP selection

### Summary
The CU-UP selection functions `select_cuup_slice()` and `select_cuup_round_robin()` in the NR RRC module contain type confusion bugs where they incorrectly apply the address-of operator and cast to `struct rrc_cuup_tree *` when passing the tree parameter to the `RB_FOREACH` macro. The parameter `t` is already a `const struct rrc_cuup_tree *`, so taking its address creates a pointer-to-pointer type that is inc
